nasb.text: You shall break them with a rod of iron, You shall shatter them like earthenware.’ ”

esv.text: You shall break them with a rod of iron and dash them in pieces like a potter’s vessel.”

cnv.text: 你必用鐵杖擊打他們， 好像打碎陶器一樣粉碎他們。’”

ccb.text: 你要用铁杖统治他们， 把他们像陶器一般打碎。’”

csbs.text: 你将用铁杖打破他们， 把他们像陶匠的器皿那样打碎。”
